home_subtitle: Just see this whenever you feel — this is for you only 🙂

timeline.note: Honestly didn't know this one small conversation would change a lot of things.
Slowly realised — yaar yeh banda actually sunta hai. Rare thing, honestly.
Dil mein hi baat atak rahi thi. But said it anyway. Best decision.
Uss din jo feel hua, woh words mein likhna thoda mushkil hai. But it was warm.
Even stress feels manageable when someone's sitting right there with you.
Small moments, random talks — these actually add up to something really nice.
Things change, but this one's still here. And that says something.
Ek din yeh bhi hoga. Aur uss din ki wait worth it hogi — promise. 🌸

message:
Tu thodi overthink karti hai. Yeh main pehle din se jaanta hoon. Ek chhoti si baat bhi teri mind mein teen din tak chalti rehti hai — "usne yeh kyu bola, woh kyu hua, kya main galat tha…" — aur phir tu khud hi exhaust ho jaati hai. Main isliye tujhe rok nahi sakta, kyunki yeh tere andar hai. But main itna zaroor jaanta hoon ki jab tu overthink karti hai, inside mein ek bahut caring aur sensitive insaan hai. Jo darta hai ki log dukhi na hon. Jo chahta hai ki sab theek rahe. Yeh overthinking koi flaw nahi hai — it's just tu thoda zyada feel karti hai. And that's actually not a bad thing.

Tu gusse mein alag hi lagti hai. Yeh bhi sach hai 😄 Thodi si baat pe chhup jaana, ya phir seedha bol dena — koi beech ka raasta nahi tera. Aur jab tu gusse mein hoti hai, toh main samajh jaata hoon ki koi cheez ne andar se touch kiya hoga. Kyunki tu binu wajah gussa nahi hoti. There's always something underneath. Isliye main zyada seriously leta hoon tera gussa — argue karne ke liye nahi, but samajhne ke liye.

Tu bahut socially selective hai. Yani — zindagi mein bahut saare log hain tere aas paas, but tu genuinely open nahi hoti sabke saath. Aur honestly? Mujhe yeh achha lagta hai. Tu sirf wahan open hai jahan safe lagta hai. Aur agar tu mere saath comfortable hai — toh yeh mujhe actually valuable lagta hai. Kyunki main jaanta hoon yeh sab ke saath nahi hota tere saath.

Chhoti chhoti cheezein jo main notice karta hoon tere baare mein — jab tu thaka hua feel karti hai, teri baatein thodi slow ho jaati hain. Jab kuch achha hota hai, tu seedha nahi bol deti — but ek halki si smile aati hai. Jab tu pareshaan hoti hai kisi cheez se, tu khud hi usse handle karne ki koshish karti hai pehle. Yeh chhoti cheezein hain. But main notice karta hoon.

Tu different hai dusron se — yeh main isliye nahi bol raha kyunki yeh bolna "chahiye". I'm saying it because I've actually seen it. Tu bahut logon se zyada mature sochti hai kuch cheezein mein. Aur kuch cheezein mein ekdum bacchi jaisi bhi hai — dono ek saath. Yeh combination rare hota hai.

Yeh jo bhi tune read kiya — main chahta tha ki ek jagah ho jahan sab clearly likha ho. Jab bhi tu thoda down feel kare, ya confused ho, ya bas yeh feel kare ki koi nahi samjha — yahan aa. Yeh sab tere liye hi hai. Koi generic nahi, koi copy paste nahi. Sirf tera. 🌸

quiz.q: 2. 😤 Jab tu gusse mein hoti hai — tu kya karti hai?
3. 😑 Sabse zyada annoy karne wali cheez?
options: Log message read karke reply nahi karte
quiz.answer: Log message read karke reply nahi karte

quiz.q: 4. 📖 Padhne ka style kya hai tera?
5. 💬 Ek cheez jo tu aksar bolti hai?
6. 🌙 Tu raat ko kab soti hai usually?
7. 🎵 Music sunti hai tension mein ya nahi?
8. 👭 Social setting mein tu kaisi hoti hai?
9. 🤔 Jab koi galat prove kare tujhe — tu kya karti hai?
options: Andar hi andar upset hoti hoon
quiz.answer: Andar hi andar upset hoti hoon

quiz.q: 10. 💭 Teri overthinking kab sabse zyada hoti hai?
options: Kisi se ladd ne ke baad

mood_sad:
Ruk. Pehle ek lambi saanss le.

Sab cheez ek saath theek nahi hoti — aur yeh okay hai. Har dard ka ek time hota hai, aur woh time beet jaata hai. Tujhe abhi sab solve nahi karna. Bas iss moment mein rehna hai.

Aur sun — tu jo bhi feel kar rahi hai, woh valid hai. Main tere saath hoon. Seriously. 💖
mood_angry:
Okay okay, chill kar thodi der 😄

Main samajh raha hoon tu gusse mein hai. And honestly? Tu gusse mein bhi cute lagti hai — but main yeh tujhe directly bolne wala nahi tha 🙂

Seriously baat karein toh — jab gussa ho, kuch mat bol ya karo jo baad mein pachtana pade. Thodi der baad sab better lagega. Promise. 🌸
mood_stress:
Ek kaam karo. Jo bhi book ya notes khula hai — band karo. 5 minute ke liye.

Tu already bahut kuch kar rahi hai. Yeh stress isliye hai kyunki tujhe actually parwah hai — aur woh teri strength hai, weakness nahi.

Ab ek topic lo, woh ek topic theek karo, phir agle par jao. Step by step. Tu kar sakti hai — I've seen it. ✨
surprise_msg:
Koi reason nahi chahiye. Koi occasion nahi chahiye.
Tu hai — yeh kaafi hai. 💖
footer: Made with 💖 — sirf tere liye, Priyanka 🌸
quiz_pass_msg:
See? Main jaanta hoon tujhe 😌
Kuch cheezein words mein nahi poochhni padtein — bas dikh jaati hain.
quiz_fail_msg:
Ik u know me — thoda aur try karo! Dobara khelo, baar baar khelo 😄
Main toh hamesha yahan hoon tere liye 💖
